description: Curated source-master input for the next Yomira source pack compilation. Files under definitions/ are source-pack-ready overlays; other entries document HTTP targets that need connector/profile work before they should be advertised as installable.

notes: Existing hand-authored config worked in testing.

needsConnectorOrSelectorValidation.reason: Custom HTTP/API behavior is outside the current converted connector set. Needs native profile work instead of a blind selector import.

recommendedNextIteration: Device-validate Mangakakalot, Manganato, MangaKatana, Hiperdex, Hentai20, and Weeb Central search/detail/chapter/page routes after importing the curated source-master preview pack.
Review MangaFire separately because its Keiyoushi implementation is more custom than a direct declarative source profile.
